title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete - Starting with no WiFi connection
feature: App Settings - General - Account - Account Delete
scenario: Delete account with no WiFi connection, verify retry behavior offline and successful deletion after reconnecting
steps: Verify the popup closes and returns to Device Settings.
Tap Delete icon again and Confirm.
Observe the same popup appears again.
Verify the same popup appears again.
Observe a spinner appears followed by a confirmation dialog.
Verify the user is logged out and returned to the account screen.
Navigate to Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account.
Verify the user is not logged in.
Confirm on the cloud side that the account was properly removed.
expected: When offline, tapping Delete and Confirm shows an "Unable to perform task..." popup. Tapping "Later" closes the popup and returns to Device Settings. Tapping Delete and Confirm again shows the same popup. Tapping "Retry" while still offline shows the popup again. After turning on WiFi and tapping "Retry", a spinner appears followed by a confirmation dialog, then the user is logged out and returned to the account screen. The user is not logged in under Poly Lens Menu > Support > Account, and the account is properly removed on the cloud side.
